articles.title: Knicks stay alive in race for No. 2 seed in East, beat Celtics in Tatum’s return to MSG
articles.description:
Tatum finished with 24 points, 13 rebounds and eight assists in his first game back on the Madison Square Garden court where he ruptured his Achilles tendon in last season's playoffs.

The post Knicks stay alive in race for No. 2 seed in East, beat Celtics in Tatum’s return to MSG appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics lost to Knicks, impacting their playoff positioning in the Eastern Conference.
Jayson Tatum scored 24 points in his return to Madison Square Garden on April 9.
Boston's playoff chances are affected as Knicks vie for No. 2 seed.

articles.title: Rapper Flavor Flav donates sports equipment to Cambridge youth center
articles.description:
“CYP's purpose is to provide Cambridge youth and teens with a just, joyful and caring community where they forge healthy relationships, discover who they are, and develop new skills,” the City of Cambridge said.

The post Rapper Flavor Flav donates sports equipment to Cambridge youth center appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rapper Flavor Flav donated sports equipment to the Cambridge Youth Program on April 9, 2026.
The donation aims to support Cambridge youth in developing skills and healthy relationships.
CYP serves local teens, fostering a caring community for personal growth and engagement.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown has a candid answer when asked if he deserves NBA MVP this season
articles.description:
"The analytics don't quantify who I am and [what] my spirit is.”

The post Jaylen Brown has a candid answer when asked if he deserves NBA MVP this season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown discusses his MVP candidacy amid strong performances this season.
Brown emphasizes that analytics fail to capture his true impact on the Celtics.
His comments resonate with Boston fans, highlighting the team's playoff aspirations.
